message:
fix: notify mayor after refinery merge, always delete polecat branches

After refinery merges polecat work, nudge mayor/ so the dispatcher can
unblock dependent beads immediately instead of waiting for the next poll
cycle. Also ensures polecat/* branches are always cleaned up after merge
regardless of DeleteMergedBranches config.

Cherry-picked from PR #2502 (GH#2434).

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
